fields.manufacturer_labeler: Wyeth Pharmaceutical Division of Wyeth Holdings LLC
fields.indication_summary: Active immunization for the prevention of invasive disease caused by Streptococcus pneumoniae serotypes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 8, 9V, 10A, 11A, 12F, 14, 15B, 18C, 19A, 19F, 22F, 23F, and 33F in individuals 6 weeks of age and older; also prevention of otitis media caused by certain serotypes.
fields.dosage_forms_strengths: 0.5 mL suspension for intramuscular injection, supplied in a single-dose pre-filled syringe

notes: Licensed under a Biologics License Application (BLA), not an NDA, since this is a vaccine rather than a small-molecule drug. Has two distinct, both-legitimate 'Revised:' dates: the Prescribing Information body says 4/2023, while the SPL document's trailing establishment block says 7/2025 -- a 2+ year gap, likely reflecting an administrative SPL resubmission (e.g. manufacturing site changes) without a full PI content revision. See revision_dates for both. CORRECTED: dosage_forms_strengths originally said 'single-dose vial/prefilled syringe' -- 'vial' was fabricated; the source text only describes a single-dose pre-filled syringe, no vial presentation. The Packaging table (page 34) also lists carton/syringe NDCs (0005-2000-10, 0005-2000-01, 0005-2000-02) across two package configurations; no single ndc value can represent that, so left null rather than picking one arbitrarily.
